business.name: Jumpstart & lockouts LLC
business.tagline: Keys locked in? Battery dead? We're on the way.

hero.headline: Locked out at *2am*? We answer.
hero.subheadline: Springfield's go-to team for lockouts, dead batteries, and flat tires — fast response, fair prices.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Locked Out? Dead Battery? Flat Tire?

services.title: Car Lockouts
services.description: Keys inside? We'll have you back in your car in minutes, not hours.

services.title: Jump Starts
services.description: Dead battery got you stranded? We bring the power to get you moving.

services.title: Flat Tire Service
services.description: Tire goes flat, we handle the fix or swap. Quick roadside help when you need it.

services.title: House Lockouts
services.description: Locked out of home? We get you back inside without damaging your door.

about.heading: Springfield's Emergency Response Team
about.body: We're the Springfield locksmith team that shows up fast and gets the job done right. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Everton C.
reviews.text: Keys locked in the car and they showed up in 20 minutes, took 5 to open it. Great service — got them on speed dial now.

reviews.name: CJ D.
reviews.text: Flat tire on the highway during a snowstorm — they went above and beyond! Responded quickly in the snow and had me safely back on the road.

reviews.name: Goodie G.
reviews.text: John helped me get my car started, stayed with me till I filled up gas, and made sure I was safe to go before he left.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Springfield & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across the Pioneer Valley

cta.heading: Locked Out? Battery Dead? We're Coming.
cta.body: Don't wait around hoping someone shows up. Call the team Springfield trusts for fast, reliable emergency service.
